body.visualDesc: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the sleeping lemon-yellow duckling in the golden straw nest, looking up at TWO clearly SEPARATE chicks standing side by side: Pip (cream-white chick wearing ONLY a straw farmer hat and a red neck bandana - NO glasses, NO green scarf) giggling with eyes crinkled in joy, giving a playful wink, and Bo (tan sandy-brown chick wearing ONLY round thin wire-framed eyeglasses and a green neck scarf - NO hat, NO bandana) grinning mischievously. Mo (blue-grey, red knitted scarf, tall red comb) shakes his head with a fond smile behind them. These are three distinct small chicks, the same size as each other. CRITICAL: NO whole egg anywhere - only empty broken eggshell halves beside the nest. Warm dusk glow on the coop porch.
